title: Daniele F.
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Daniele F'''. (surname withheld) is the [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] member who developed the entry of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Barrow Oicunn/Legends|Barrow Oicunn]] through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature.

His alias on [[StarWars.com]] is ''Jedi Master Daniele F'', and is known as [[User:Jedi Master Daniele|Jedi Master Daniele]] on [[Wookieepedia]].

==Biography==
A [[StarWars.com]] member since August [[2002]], Daniele has been a ''[[Star Wars]]'' fan since his childhood and claims to be an expert on the Saga. He is an Italian Law Student.
